name: image-tools
description: Content-aware JPEG → WebP/AVIF conversion: classify image content type, look up calibrated perceptual-quality equivalents, fuzz encoder parameters, and ship the smallest file that meets the quality floor.
comment: No npm dependencies. Requires external CLI tools on PATH (ImageMagick 7, cwebp, avifenc, ssimulacra2) and — for calibration only — a Python venv (see requirements.txt) plus dssim/ffmpeg/butteraugli_main. See README.
